Happy Birthday

RASHI

Our Beautiful Memories ✦

Every day with you is a quiet miracle.
You are my home, my laughter, and my greatest adventure.
I am grateful for your warmth that fills every room,
Your love that steadies every storm,
And the beautiful life we have built side by side.
Today and always, I cherish the extraordinary woman you are —
My partner, my joy, my forever.

With all my love, always ♥
